summary: Configured Zed editor with settings.json (One Dark, agent, extensions), keymap.json (6 custom bindings + default reference), tasks.json (3 tasks), rewrote project-overview.md for Zed, and created 5 documentation files including a collaborator-friendly keybindings guide and README hub.
